questions.question: In Ezra 1, who issued the decree to rebuild the house of the LORD in Jerusalem?
questions.answer: Cyrus king of Persia

questions.question: Which prophet's words are said to be fulfilled by the decree in Ezra 1?
questions.answer: Jeremiah

questions.question: What did Cyrus say the LORD had given him in Ezra 1?
questions.answer: All the kingdoms of the earth
options: All the kingdoms of the earth

questions.question: In Ezra 1, who was invited to go up to Jerusalem to build the house of the LORD?
questions.answer: Whoever among his people whose God is with him
options: Whoever among his people whose God is with him
Only the chief of the fathers

questions.question: According to Ezra 1, besides silver, gold, and goods, what else were the people asked to bring?
questions.answer: Beasts

questions.question: In Ezra 1, who rose up to go build the house of the LORD?
questions.answer: Chief of fathers of Judah and Benjamin, priests, and Levites
options: Chief of fathers of Judah and Benjamin, priests, and Levites

questions.question: Which king brought forth the vessels of the house of the LORD in Ezra 1?
questions.answer: Cyrus

questions.question: In Ezra 1, who numbered the vessels unto Sheshbazzar?
questions.answer: Mithredath the treasurer

questions.question: How many golden chargers were listed in Ezra 1?
questions.answer: Thirty

questions.question: How many silver chargers does Ezra 1 say were brought back?
questions.answer: One thousand

questions.question: How many knives are mentioned in Ezra 1?
questions.answer: Twenty-nine

questions.question: In Ezra 1, how many basins of gold were recorded?
questions.answer: Thirty

questions.question: How many silver basins of a second sort are listed in Ezra 1?
questions.answer: Four hundred and ten

questions.question: What was the total count of all gold and silver vessels in Ezra 1?
questions.answer: Five thousand four hundred

questions.question: Who brought the vessels of the captivity back to Jerusalem in Ezra 1?
questions.answer: Sheshbazzar

questions.question: Who came with Zerubbabel according to Ezra 2?
questions.answer: Jeshua, Nehemiah, Seraiah, Reelaiah, Mordecai, Bilshan, Mispar, Bigvai, Rehum, Baanah
options: Jeshua, Nehemiah, Seraiah, Reelaiah, Mordecai, Bilshan, Mispar, Bigvai, Rehum, Baanah

questions.question: How many children of Parosh returned in Ezra 2?
questions.answer: Two thousand one hundred seventy and two
options: Two thousand one hundred seventy and two

questions.question: Which group had one thousand two hundred and twelve members in Ezra 2?
questions.answer: The children of Pahath-moab, of the children of Jeshua and Joab
options: The children of Pahath-moab, of the children of Jeshua and Joab

questions.question: Who were the first priests listed in Ezra 2?
questions.answer: The children of Jedaiah, of the house of Jeshua
options: The children of Jedaiah, of the house of Jeshua

questions.question: How many priests returned in Ezra 2?
questions.answer: Nine hundred seventy and three

questions.question: Which Levite group numbered seventy and four in Ezra 2?
questions.answer: The children of Jeshua and Kadmiel, of the children of Hodaviah
options: The children of Jeshua and Kadmiel, of the children of Hodaviah

questions.question: How many singers returned in Ezra 2?
questions.answer: One hundred twenty and eight

questions.question: How many porters returned in Ezra 2?
questions.answer: One hundred thirty and nine

questions.question: Which servant group is called in Ezra 2 and numbered three hundred ninety and two?
questions.answer: The Nethinims

questions.question: What was the total size of the congregation in Ezra 2?
questions.answer: Forty-two thousand three hundred and threescore
options: Forty-two thousand three hundred and threescore

questions.question: How many horses did the congregation have in Ezra 2?
questions.answer: Seven hundred thirty and six

questions.question: How many mules are recorded in Ezra 2?
questions.answer: Two hundred forty and five

questions.question: How many camels did the returning group bring in Ezra 2?
questions.answer: Four hundred thirty and five

questions.question: What did some of the chief of the fathers do when they came to the house of the LORD in Ezra 2?
questions.answer: Offered freely for the house of God to set it up
options: Offered freely for the house of God to set it up

questions.question: How much gold did the chief of fathers give for the work in Ezra 2?
questions.answer: Sixty and one thousand drams of gold
options: Sixty and one thousand drams of gold

questions.question: In Ezra 3, which month had arrived when the people gathered as one man?
questions.answer: Seventh month

questions.question: Who was the son of Jozadak that stood up in Ezra 3?
questions.answer: Jeshua

questions.question: What relation was Zerubbabel to Shealtiel in Ezra 3?
questions.answer: Son

questions.question: What did they build in Ezra 3 before the temple foundation?
questions.answer: The altar of the God of Israel
options: The altar of the God of Israel

questions.question: Why did they set the altar upon its bases in Ezra 3?
questions.answer: Because of fear of the people of those countries
options: Because of fear of the people of those countries
Because they had no other place

questions.question: Which feast did they keep in Ezra 3?
questions.answer: Feast of tabernacles

questions.question: What daily offerings did Ezra 3 say were offered after the feast?
questions.answer: Daily burnt offerings morning and evening
options: Daily burnt offerings morning and evening

questions.question: What had not yet been laid when the altar offerings began in Ezra 3?
questions.answer: The foundation of the temple

questions.question: From where did they bring cedar trees in Ezra 3?
questions.answer: Lebanon

questions.question: In Ezra 3, who was appointed from twenty years old upward to set forward the work?
questions.answer: The Levites

questions.question: Which sons of Asaph were appointed to praise the LORD with cymbals?
questions.answer: The Levites

questions.question: Why could the noise of shouting and weeping not be discerned in Ezra 3?
questions.answer: Because the shout of joy mixed with the weeping
options: Because the shout of joy mixed with the weeping
Because the priests played loud music

questions.question: Who wept with a loud voice in Ezra 3?
questions.answer: Many ancient priests, Levites, and chief fathers who had seen the first house
options: Many ancient priests, Levites, and chief fathers who had seen the first house

questions.question: What did all the people do when the foundation of the house of the LORD was laid?
questions.answer: They shouted with a great shout
options: They shouted with a great shout

questions.question: In Ezra 4, who desired to build with the children of the captivity?
questions.answer: The adversaries of Judah and Benjamin
options: The adversaries of Judah and Benjamin

questions.question: What reason did the adversaries give for wanting to build with them in Ezra 4?
questions.answer: We seek your God, as ye do
options: We seek your God, as ye do

questions.question: Why did Zerubbabel say they should not build with the adversaries?
questions.answer: They had nothing to do with building unto the LORD
options: They had nothing to do with building unto the LORD
They were not citizens of Judah

questions.question: What did the people of the land do to hinder the rebuilding?
questions.answer: Weakened the hands of the people of Judah and troubled them in building
options: Weakened the hands of the people of Judah and troubled them in building
Built a wall around the city

questions.question: Until whose reign did the adversaries hire counselors against the Jews?
questions.answer: Until the reign of Darius king of Persia
options: Until the reign of Darius king of Persia

questions.question: To which king did the adversaries send an accusation in Ezra 4?
questions.answer: Artaxerxes king of Persia

questions.question: Who were the chancellor and scribe that wrote the accusation letter in Ezra 4?
questions.answer: Rehum and Shimshai

questions.question: What did the letter say would happen if Jerusalem was built again?
questions.answer: The kings would lose toll, tribute, and custom
options: The kings would lose toll, tribute, and custom

questions.question: What book did the adversaries ask to be searched to prove the city rebellious?
questions.answer: The book of the records of thy fathers
options: The book of the records of thy fathers

questions.question: According to the king's answer in Ezra 4, when should the work cease?
questions.answer: Until another commandment should be given from him
options: Until another commandment should be given from him

questions.question: In Ezra 4, when did the work of the house of God cease?
questions.answer: Unto the second year of the reign of Darius king of Persia
options: Unto the second year of the reign of Darius king of Persia
Until the first year of Artaxerxes
Until the third year of Darius

questions.question: Which prophets prophesied to the Jews in Ezra 5?
questions.answer: Haggai and Zechariah

questions.question: Who questioned the elders about who commanded them to build the house?
questions.answer: Tatnai, governor on this side the river, and Shethar-boznai
options: Tatnai, governor on this side the river, and Shethar-boznai

questions.question: What did the elders say in Ezra 5 when asked who commanded them?
questions.answer: We are the servants of the God of heaven and earth
options: We are the servants of the God of heaven and earth

questions.question: Which king's decree did the elders prove in Ezra 5?
questions.answer: Cyrus

questions.question: Who laid the foundation of the house of God according to Ezra 5?
questions.answer: Sheshbazzar

questions.question: What happened to the work of the house of God by the commandment of the king of Persia in Ezra 5?
questions.answer: They returned answer by letter and the work prospered
options: They returned answer by letter and the work prospered

questions.question: How many bullocks were offered at the dedication of the house in Ezra 6?
questions.answer: One hundred

questions.question: How many rams were offered at dedication in Ezra 6?
questions.answer: Two hundred

questions.question: How many lambs were offered at the dedication of the house in Ezra 6?
questions.answer: Four hundred

questions.question: How many he goats were offered for a sin offering at dedication in Ezra 6?
questions.answer: Twelve

questions.answer: At Achmetha in the palace in the province of the Medes
options: At Achmetha in the palace in the province of the Medes

questions.question: What height and breadth were given for the house of God in Ezra 6?
questions.answer: Sixty cubits high and sixty cubits broad
options: Sixty cubits high and sixty cubits broad
Fifty cubits high and forty cubits broad
One hundred cubits high and broad
Thirty cubits high and thirty cubits broad

questions.question: How many rows of great stones were specified for the temple in Ezra 6?
questions.answer: Three rows

questions.answer: Tatnai, governor beyond the river, Shethar-boznai, and companions
options: Tatnai, governor beyond the river, Shethar-boznai, and companions

questions.answer: Bullocks, rams, lambs, wheat, salt, wine, and oil
options: Bullocks, rams, lambs, wheat, salt, wine, and oil

questions.answer: Timber pulled down from house and hanged on it, and house made a dunghill
options: Timber pulled down from house and hanged on it, and house made a dunghill

questions.question: On what day of Adar was the house finished in Ezra 6?
questions.answer: Third day

questions.question: In which year of Darius was the house of God finished?
questions.answer: Sixth year

questions.question: What feast did the children of Israel keep after the house was finished in Ezra 6?
questions.answer: Passover

questions.question: How many days did they keep the feast of unleavened bread in Ezra 6?
questions.answer: Seven days

questions.question: Who is Ezra's father mentioned in Ezra 7?
questions.answer: Seraiah

questions.question: What was Ezra described as in Ezra 7?
questions.answer: A ready scribe in the law of Moses
options: A ready scribe in the law of Moses

questions.question: In which month did Ezra arrive in Jerusalem?
questions.answer: Fifth month

questions.answer: To seek the law of the LORD, do it, and teach statutes and judgments
options: To seek the law of the LORD, do it, and teach statutes and judgments

questions.question: How many counsellors of the king are mentioned in Ezra 7?

questions.answer: One hundred measures

questions.answer: One hundred baths of wine and one hundred baths of oil
options: One hundred baths of wine and one hundred baths of oil

questions.answer: Priests, Levites, singers, porters, Nethinims, or ministers of this house of God
options: Priests, Levites, singers, porters, Nethinims, or ministers of this house of God

questions.question: Who was authorized to set magistrates and judges in Ezra 7?
questions.answer: Ezra

questions.question: What might happen to those who would not do the law of the king in Ezra 7?
questions.answer: Death, banishment, confiscation of goods, or imprisonment
options: Death, banishment, confiscation of goods, or imprisonment

questions.answer: By the river that runneth to Ahava
options: By the river that runneth to Ahava

questions.question: Who was of the sons of Phinehas in Ezra 8?
questions.answer: Gershom

questions.answer: A fast to seek of God a right way for them and their little ones and substance
options: A fast to seek of God a right way for them and their little ones and substance

options: Because the hand of God was upon them and his power was against the enemy

questions.answer: Six hundred fifty talents

questions.question: How many vessels of fine copper were weighed in Ezra 8?
questions.answer: Two vessels

questions.answer: Holy unto the LORD

questions.answer: Chambers of the house of the LORD

questions.answer: Sherebiah

questions.answer: They had not separated themselves from the people of the lands and had taken foreign wives

questions.answer: Canaanites, Hittites, Perizzites, Jebusites, Ammonites, Moabites, Egyptians, Amorites
options: Canaanites, Hittites, Perizzites, Jebusites, Ammonites, Moabites, Egyptians, Amorites

questions.answer: He rent his garment and mantle and plucked off the hair of his head and beard
options: He rent his garment and mantle and plucked off the hair of his head and beard
He sent a letter to the king

questions.question: Who assembled with Ezra when he was astonied?
questions.answer: Those who trembled at the words of the God of Israel
options: Those who trembled at the words of the God of Israel

questions.question: At what sacrifice did Ezra rise from his heaviness?
questions.answer: At the evening sacrifice

options: They had grown up unto the heavens

questions.question: What had God given them after their evil deeds in Ezra 9?
questions.answer: A remnant to escape and a nail in his holy place
options: A remnant to escape and a nail in his holy place

questions.answer: An unclean land filled with filthiness and abominations
options: An unclean land filled with filthiness and abominations

questions.answer: Their sons

questions.answer: Their daughters of the people of the land
options: Their daughters of the people of the land

questions.answer: So they may be strong and eat the good of the land and leave it for an inheritance
options: So they may be strong and eat the good of the land and leave it for an inheritance
So they may become rich quickly
So they may avoid all nations

questions.question: What did Ezra say God had punished less than?
questions.answer: Less than their iniquities deserved

questions.question: What did Ezra call God in Ezra 9?
questions.answer: Righteous

questions.question: Why could they not stand before God according to Ezra 9?
questions.answer: Because they were before him in their trespasses
options: Because they were before him in their trespasses

questions.question: What did Ezra say about the remnant in Ezra 9?
questions.answer: They yet escaped as of that day
options: They yet escaped as of that day

questions.answer: In the street of the house of God
options: In the street of the house of God

questions.answer: Shechaniah the son of Jehiel

questions.answer: To put away all strange wives and their children
options: To put away all strange wives and their children

questions.answer: The chamber of Johanan the son of Eliashib
options: The chamber of Johanan the son of Eliashib

questions.answer: He ate no bread and drank no water

questions.answer: Three days

questions.question: What would happen to those who did not come within three days?
questions.answer: Their substance would be forfeited and they separated from the congregation

questions.question: On which month and day did all the men of Judah and Benjamin gather in Ezra 10?
questions.answer: Ninth month, twentieth day

questions.answer: As thou hast said, so must we do

questions.answer: First day of the tenth month
options: First day of the tenth month
First day of the ninth month

questions.question: By what day had they made an end with all that had strange wives?

options: First day of the first month
First day of the tenth month
Second day of the first month

questions.answer: Jeiel, Mattithiah, Zabad, Zebina, Jadau, Joel, Benaiah
options: Jeiel, Mattithiah, Zabad, Zebina, Jadau, Joel, Benaiah

questions.question: What was the declared hope in Israel regarding strange wives in Ezra 10?
questions.answer: There is hope in Israel concerning this thing
options: There is hope in Israel concerning this thing

questions.question: Who said the matter of strange wives belonged to Ezra?
questions.answer: Shechaniah the son of Jehiel

questions.answer: All the congregation answered with a loud voice, As thou hast said, so must we do
